principle: 1:1 — every intended construct maps to exactly one code site with a PRESENT criterion an independent auditor can check. No construct may be ABSENT; RS must contain NO cumulative pooling of views.

constructs.name: STOP / short interrupted run
constructs.code_site: view_call(): max_tokens<=70 hard cap + prompt 'first rough PARTIAL read, then stop; do not resolve'
constructs.present_criterion: view generation is token-capped AND prompt forbids resolution/completion
constructs.inverts_if: views run to completion / no cap

constructs.name: interpretation abandonment
constructs.code_site: rs_run(): a view is used ONLY to produce its signature, then discarded; view text is never appended to any later view or to rebuild
constructs.present_criterion: no variable carries view TEXT forward into other views or into rebuild in RS
constructs.inverts_if: views retained/pooled (that is RS_pool, the control)

constructs.name: viewpoint SHIFT (sampled)
constructs.code_site: sample_lenses(seed,attempt): draw V distinct lenses from LENS_POOL via seed-seeded RNG; SHIFT-AGAIN draws fresh lenses
constructs.present_criterion: each view uses a different lens; lens set varies by seed AND by attempt
constructs.inverts_if: same fixed lens set every seed/attempt

constructs.name: independent reread of same source
constructs.code_site: RS view_call reads T0 ONLY (fr) + lens; never any other view
constructs.present_criterion: in RS, the user content to view_call contains T0 and lens but NO other view output

constructs.name: partial independence
constructs.code_site: rs_run(): the V views for one candidate are produced without shared context (each call is issued with prior=None in RS; views run sequentially but independently — parallelism is at candidate level in main())
constructs.present_criterion: no view sees another view's output within a candidate in RS

constructs.name: structural signature extraction
constructs.code_site: signature_call(view): separate call -> 'SUBJECT/LEVEL/KEY-DISTINCTION', reads the view only
constructs.present_criterion: a distinct call per view yields a structural signature from the view text alone
constructs.inverts_if: no signature step / signature reads T0 or other views

constructs.name: COMPARE across views
constructs.code_site: compare_call(signatures): reads the V signatures ONLY, names structural DIFFERENCES, picks no winner
constructs.present_criterion: a distinct call consumes only signatures and outputs deltas; no view text; no selection
constructs.inverts_if: pooling text instead of comparing signatures / picking a best view

constructs.name: REBUILD from differences + bounded convergence
constructs.code_site: rebuild_call(deltas, T0): synthesizes ONE replacement frame from deltas (+T0 anchor), not from any view; check_call() grades structural change vs T0; HOLD -> one SHIFT-AGAIN (cap 2)
constructs.present_criterion: rebuild reads deltas (+T0) but NOT views; a versioned convergence rule (SELECT/HOLD-2/SHIFT-AGAIN) is present with attempt cap
constructs.inverts_if: rebuild restates a single view / no convergence rule / unbounded

no_pooling_invariant: In RS and RS_flat, no code path concatenates prior VIEW outputs into a subsequent view's or the rebuild's input. Cumulative pooling appears ONLY in RS_pool (intentional inversion control).

conditions.RS_pool: as RS but construct 4/5 INVERTED (views pooled) — isolation control for independence
conditions.RS_flat: constructs 1-5 PRESENT; 6-8 ABSENT (views scored directly) — isolation control for compare+rebuild

target_blindness: breakthrough_structure NEVER enters generation (scorer-only). LENS_POOL is generic structural reframes with no historical-target content. cognition-agnostic (no v0.1 material).
acceptance_gate: independent auditor must grade constructs 1-8 PRESENT on run_scheduler_exhibit.py AND confirm no_pooling_invariant holds in RS/RS_flat, before RS runs.
status: BINDING DRAFTED — awaiting independent code audit against implementation.
